H2100.strongs_def: to flow freely (as water), i.e. (specifically) to have a (sexual) flux; figuratively, to waste away; also to overflow
H2100.kjv_def: flow, gush out, have a (running) issue, pine away, run.

H2102.derivation: or (by permutation) זִיד; a primitive root;
H2102.strongs_def: to seethe; figuratively, to be insolent
H2102.kjv_def: be proud, deal proudly, presume, (come) presumptuously, sod.

H2104.derivation: plural probably from the same as H2123 (זִיז); prominent;
H2104.strongs_def: Zuzites, an aboriginal tribe of Palestine

H2106.derivation: apparently from the same root as H2099 (זִו) (in the sense of prominence);
H2106.strongs_def: an angle (as projecting), i.e. (by implication) a corner-column (or anta)

H2107.strongs_def: probably to shake out, i.e. (by implication) to scatter profusely; figuratively, to treat lightly

H2108.strongs_def: probably scattering, i.e. removal; used adverbially, except

H2109.strongs_def: perhaps properly, to be plump, i.e. (transitively) to nourish

H2110.strongs_def: {perhaps properly, to be plump, i.e. (transitively) to nourish}

H2111.strongs_def: properly, to shake off, i.e. (figuratively) to agitate (as with fear)

H2113.kjv_def: be removed, trouble, vexation. Compare H2189 (זַעֲוָה).

H2114.strongs_def: to turn aside (especially for lodging); hence to be aforeigner, strange, profane; specifically (active participle) to commit adultery
H2114.kjv_def: (come from) another (man, place), fanner, go away, (e-) strange(-r, thing, woman).

H2117.derivation: probably from the root of H2123 (זִיז); prominent;

H2119.strongs_def: to crawl; by implication, to fear

H2120.derivation: feminine active participle of H2119 (זָחַל); crawling (i.e. serpent);
H2120.strongs_def: Zocheleth, a boundary stone in. Palestine

H2123.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to be conspicuous;
H2123.strongs_def: fulness of the breast; also a moving creature

H2124.derivation: apparently from the same as H2123 (זִיז); prominence;
H2124.strongs_def: Ziza, the name of two Israelites

H2126.derivation: from H2109 (זוּן); well-fed; or perhaps an orthographical error for H2124 (זִיזָא);

H2128.derivation: from the same as H2203 (זֶפֶת); flowing;
H2128.strongs_def: Ziph, the name of a place in Palestine; also of an Israelite
H2128.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H2130.strongs_def: a Ziphite or inhabitant of Ziph

H2131.derivation: (Isaiah 50: (feminine); and זִק; or זֵק; from H2187 (זָנַק);
H2131.strongs_def: properly, what leaps forth, i.e. flash of fire, or a burning arrow; also (from the original sense of the root) a bond

H2132.derivation: probably from an unused root (akin to H2099 (זִו));
H2132.strongs_def: an olive (as yielding illuminating oil), the tree, the branch or the berry

H2135.strongs_def: to be translucent; figuratively, to be innocent
H2135.kjv_def: be (make) clean, cleanse, be clear, count pure.

H2136.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2135 (זָכָה);

H2138.derivation: properly, passive participle of H2142 (זָכַר), but used for H2145 (זָכָר);

H2139.strongs_def: Zakkur, the name of seven Israelites

H2141.strongs_def: to be transparent or clean (phys. or morally)

H2142.derivation: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)
H2142.strongs_def: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
H2142.kjv_def: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) remembrance, [idiom] still, think on, [idiom] well.
H2142.usage: remember(172x), mention(21x), remembrance(10x), recorder(9x), mindful(6x), think(3x), record(2x)

H2143.strongs_def: a memento, abstractly recollection (rarely if ever); by implication, commemoration

H2145.strongs_def: properly, remembered, i.e. a male (of man or animals, as being the most noteworthy sex)

H2146.strongs_def: a memento (or memorable thing, day or writing)

H2147.strongs_def: Zicri, the name of twelve Israelites

H2148.derivation: or זְכַרְיָהוּ; from H2142 (זָכַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has remembered;
H2148.strongs_def: Zecarjah, the name of twenty-nine Israelites

H2149.strongs_def: properly, a shaking, i.e. perhaps a tempest

H2151.strongs_def: to shake (as in the wind), i.e. to quake; figuratively, to be loose morally, worthless or prodigal

H2152.derivation: or זִלְעָפָהxlit zilʻâphâph corrected to zilʻâphâh; from H2196 (זָעַף);
H2152.strongs_def: a glow (of wind or anger); also a famine (as consuming)

H2153.derivation: ; from an unused root apparently meaning to trickle, as myrrh; fragrant dropping;

H2154.strongs_def: a plan, especially a bad one
H2154.kjv_def: heinous crime, lewd(-ly, -ness), mischief, purpose, thought, wicked (device, mind, -ness).
H2154.usage: lewdness(14x), wickedness(4x), mischief(3x), lewd(2x), lewdly(1x), purposes(1x), thought(1x)

H2155.strongs_def: Zimmah, the name of two Israelites

H2156.derivation: or זְמֹרָה (feminine); and זְמֹר (masculine); from H2168 (זָמַר);

H2157.strongs_def: a Zamzumite, or native tribe of Palestine

H2158.derivation: or זָמִר; and (feminine) זְמִרָה; from H2167 (זָמַר);
H2158.strongs_def: a song to be accompanied with instrumental music

H2161.strongs_def: to plan, usually in a bad sense
H2161.kjv_def: consider, devise, imagine, plot, purpose, think (evil).
H2161.usage: thought(5x), devise(3x), consider(1x), purpose(1x), imagine(1x), plot(1x)

H2164.strongs_def: to agree (on a time and place)

H2166.derivation: (Aramaic) from H2165 (זְמָן); the same as H2165 (זְמָן)

H2167.derivation: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H2168 (זָמַר) through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a musical instrument, i.e.
H2167.strongs_def: play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music
H2167.kjv_def: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.

H2168.derivation: a primitive root (compare H2167 (זָמַר), H5568 (סָמַר), H6785 (צֶמֶר));

H2169.strongs_def: a gazelle (from its lightly touching the ground)

H2170.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2167 (זָמַר);

H2172.strongs_def: a musical piece or song to be accompanied by an instrument

H2174.strongs_def: Zimri, the name of five Israelites, and of an Arabian tribe

H2175.strongs_def: Zimran, a son of Abraham by Keturah

H2177.strongs_def: properly, nourished (or fully developed), i.e. a form or sort
H2177.kjv_def: divers kinds, [idiom] all manner of store.

H2179.derivation: a primitive root meaning to wag; used only as a denominative from H2180 (זָנָב);
H2179.strongs_def: to curtail, i.e. cut off the rear

H2180.derivation: from H2179 (זָנַב) (in the original sense of flapping);

H2181.derivation: a primitive root (highly-fed and therefore wanton);
H2181.strongs_def: to commit adultery (usually of the female, and less often of simple fornication, rarely of involuntary ravishment); figuratively, to commit idolatry (the Jewish people being regarded as the spouse of Jehovah)
H2181.kjv_def: (cause to) commit fornication, [idiom] continually, [idiom] great, (be an, play the) harlot, (cause to be, play the) whore, (commit, fall to) whoredom, (cause to) go a-whoring, whorish.

H2182.strongs_def: Zanoach, the name of two places in Palestine

H2185.derivation: regarded by some as if from H2109 (זוּן) or an unused root, and applied to military equipments; but evidently the feminine plural active participle of H2181 (זָנָה);

H2186.derivation: a primitive root meaning to push aside, i.e.

H2187.strongs_def: properly, to draw together the feet (as an animal about to dart upon its prey), i.e. to spring forward

H2188.derivation: from H2111 (זוּעַ) (in the sense of H3154 (יֶזַע));

H2191.derivation: from an unused root (akin (by permutation) to H6819 (צָעַר)), meaning to dwindle;

H2192.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2191 (זְעֵיר)xlit zeʻêyr corrected to zᵉʻêyr

H2194.strongs_def: properly, to foam at the mouth, i.e. to be enraged

H2195.strongs_def: strictly froth at the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) fury (especially of God's displeasure with sin)

H2196.strongs_def: properly, to boil up, i.e. (figuratively) to be peevish or angry
H2196.kjv_def: fret, sad, worse liking, be wroth.

H2199.strongs_def: to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly
H2199.kjv_def: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.
H2199.usage: cry(50x), assemble(3x), called(3x), gathered(2x), company(1x), proclaimed(1x)
